name: OnLocalSecurityQueryLocalFreshness
title: OnLocalSecurityQueryLocalFreshness
description: This callback handler is called when a node receives a secured PDU and when a node transmits a secured PDU.
It provides the possibility to build a CAPL based freshness. This freshness value is preferred to the internal Freshness Manager in the Vector Security Manager.
The internal freshness value is used if this callback is not implemented or returns an invalid value.
tables: dword OnLocalSecurityQueryLocalFreshness(dword context, char pduName[], dword dataId, dword freshnessValueId, dword attemptNr, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword& freshness, dword& freshnessLength, qword truncatedRxFreshness, dword truncatedRxFreshnessBitLength)

This callback handler is called when a node receives a secured PDU and when a node transmits a secured PDU. It provides the possibility to build a CAPL based freshness. This freshness value is preferred to the internal Freshness Manager in the Vector Security Manager. The internal freshness value is used if this callback is not implemented or returns an invalid value.
payload Byte array with the payload to be transmitted.
payloadLength Length of the payload array in byte.
freshnessLength Length of the Freshness in bit.
truncatedRxFreshnessBitLength truncated Rx Length of the truncated Rx freshness.

<=0: The query call is not successful; the value of the Freshness Manager is used. >0: The query call is successful and the arguments freshness and FreshnessLength are used for the MAC calculation / validation.

Example /// This callback can be used to get provide a USER based freshness value/// This callback is called BEFORE the cmac is calculated./// The freshness value is used to calculate the CMAC internally./// It is possible to specify an older or newer freshness value, the CMAC will be "correct" but the freshness is "wrong" (compared to the freshness of the system)dword OnLocalSecurityQueryLocalFreshness(dword context, char pduName[], dword dataId, dword freshnessValueId, dword attemptNr, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword& freshness, dword& freshnessLength, qword truncatedRxFreshness, dword truncatedRxFreshnessBitLength){ if ((dataId == 1) && (context == 0)) // check for PDU with data ID and context [(0 = tx) (1 = rx)] to specify a freshness for { freshness = 7; // new Freshness Value freshnessLength = 64; // new freshness length return 1; // use my values } return 0; // for all others use internal calculated freshness values}
